caption: A woman with dark curly hair tied back in a ponytail wears a green t-shirt and black over-ear headphones while speaking into a professional black microphone. She is seated in a studio setting with a black background featuring the white and red text "BOSS TALK 101" and "It's A League Hustle." Other text visible on the backdrop includes "CAST" and "About It!". A red and white logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" appears in the lower right of the scene. To her left, a small black monitor or device is visible on the table. Behind her is a framed piece of art depicting hands. Throughout the sequence, the woman shifts her facial expressions and head position slightly as she speaks, smiling and looking toward an off-screen interlocutor, while her posture and the surrounding equipment remain stationary.
